top_signals.title: Czech Billionaire Premier Feuds With Central Bank Over Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: The Czech prime minister heightened his public criticism of the central bank’s tight monetary policy, saying its latest move to raise interest rates will hurt the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Stocks Slide as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Professional services firms the ‘flavour of the month’ for cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Professional services firms, particularly law firms, are the “current flavour of the month” for cyberattacks, driven by the valuable client information the sector guards. Speaking to City AM, Holly Waszak, head of cyber claims advocacy at Marsh, said: “We’re seeing insurers come to us with law firms on their books, and they are trying to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
